Appendix P: University of Maryland, College Park Immunization Policy

V-1.00(H)

The policy below is current as of this publication. For more information and possible updates go to: https://policies.umd.edu/student-affairs/ university-of-maryland-college-park-immunization-policy/.

(Approved by the President August 1, 1991; revised June 1, 2000; amended February 4, 2014)
